appliedRatingCriteria.criterion: Contract tests prove duplicate, replayed, and interrupted-write retries produce exactly-once ledger effects.
Falls short of target with visible gaps or limited evidence, while remaining acceptable.

evidenceTargets.question: Do retried mutations produce exactly-once ledger effects in every replay case the contract and tests cover?

inputs.requirementAssessmentBasis: Do retried mutations produce exactly-once ledger effects in every replay case the contract and tests cover?
